blended.narrative: Stoneham is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 16 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
